welcome.preparedFor: A station prepared for one listener

mood.heading: How would you like to feel?
mood.intro: Pick an emotional destination. You can fine-tune it once the music starts.

radio.noLink: No official listening destination is configured for this track yet.

bot.greeting: Tell me how you want the music to feel. You can be specific—for example, ‘romantic but cheerful’, ‘tenang tapi tak mengantuk’, or ‘something like the last song with more energy’.
bot.clarification: Give me a mood, activity, era, title or adjustment and I’ll ask a focused question if the signal is ambiguous.
bot.semanticAvailable: Enhanced understanding can run locally in this browser.
bot.semanticUnavailable: Enhanced understanding is unavailable; lightweight mode remains ready.
bot.localProcessing: Requests are interpreted locally and grounded in this catalogue.
suggestions: Something like the last song with more energy

library.heading: Your listening shelf
library.intro: A small local record of what has worked for you.
library.empty: Nothing here yet. Tune the radio and this shelf will begin to fill.

settings.heading: Station settings
settings.installInstructions: Use your browser’s Add to Home Screen or Install app option. Availability depends on your browser.

errors.profileMissing: That gift frequency could not be found.
errors.profileInvalid: This gift profile needs a little retuning before it can open.

stationIds: This is Pink FM, tuned around you.
A little pink signal, tuned just for you.
Siti on the dial; your mood in the lead.
